description: Identifies unused Puppet classes and modules by cross-referencing class definitions on a Puppet Server against catalog data in PuppetDB. Outputs a JSON report.

puppetserver_host.description: Hostname or IP of the Puppet Server. Defaults to the certname of the target node.

puppetdb_host.description: Hostname or IP of PuppetDB. Defaults to the certname of the target node.

puppetserver_port.description: Puppet Server HTTPS port. Defaults to 8140.

environment.description: Puppet environment to analyse. Defaults to 'production'.

stale_days.description: Exclude nodes whose last report is older than this many days. Defaults to 30.

cert.description: Path to the PEM-encoded client certificate. Defaults to the target node's own Puppet certificate.

key.description: Path to the PEM-encoded client private key. Defaults to the target node's own Puppet private key.

ca_cert.description: Path to the PEM-encoded CA certificate. Defaults to /etc/puppetlabs/puppet/ssl/certs/ca.pem.
